item.title: 1:16 pm, April 5, 2026
item.description: Imperceptible little increments.

media:content.media:description: Some parts may be _slightly_ pinker, some slightly not as purple any more. Is dark red a possibility? Who amongst us can even say for sure? A surprising number of paint tubes (not even used here) and grip-tape-wrapped brushes are also visible. More than a normal number.

item.title: 11:49 am, April 5, 2026
item.description: Wonder Man is pretty great. I wish more of the Marvel stuff was that low-key.

item.title: 1:30 pm, April 3, 2026
item.description: Little boops of highlight on his mittens and spiky hat.

media:content.media:description: Attempting to make the spiky bits look spikier using orange-into-yellow edge highlights. A couple of tiny, pure white dots have been added to the tips of the uppermost-facing points.

item.title: 12:50 pm, April 3, 2026
item.description: Can’t completely stay away from those reds I don’t see properly.

media:content.media:description: A red-yellow tongue and some matching fingernails join a slightly smoothed-out pink-purple face blend with similar skin-tones applied to one hand.

item.title: 10:27 am, April 3, 2026
item.description: All that glorious skin, you tell yourself, all that expanse of carapace. But you forget the vents, dear reader, you forget that 70% of the surface area is tiny vents.

media:content.media:description: We’re studiously ignoring the vents for now. We’re working out skin tones in garish pinks. Gotta accentuate them brainpan wrinkles or why are we even here.

item.title: 8:55 am, April 3, 2026
item.description: This sculpt could have been lifted straight out of the OG Space Hulk manual art 😍

media:content.media:description: It’s a friendly space guy! Some arms are spread as though to welcome the viewer into a warm embrace, one is clutching the head of a pal, one is performing the pstandard psychic pstance. It is, for reasons of its own, also executing a Spider-Man squat on a handy bit of floor piping. It has a dark-purple basecoat of paint on its body, over black primer still visible on the pipe. The image has been meme-ified to include a ‘why just share a bug photo’ header and ‘when you can double-job as a temple-tapping meme’ footer.

item.title: 8:09 pm, April 2, 2026
item.description: 😬 @Alice https://beige.party/@Alice/111941414607174945

media:content.media:description: All scores of 65 or higher are indicative of autistic traits. The higher the score, the more autistic traits you have. In the table below are general interpretations of various total scores on the RAADS-R.

item.title: 6:14 pm, April 2, 2026
item.description:
“Sometimes” on the music box and a wall of rain outside.

🎵 Come on, thunder! Come on, thunder! 🎵

item.title: 4:54 pm, April 2, 2026
item.description: Claude’s Corollary?

item.title: 4:52 pm, April 2, 2026
item.description: We appear to be entering an exact negative of the “given enough eyeballs, all bugs are shallow” era. Just needs a pithy name.

item.title: 3:17 pm, March 28, 2026
item.description: It’s not everyday that you can be the perpetrator, mocker and monkey puppet in your own story.

item.title: 3:08 pm, March 28, 2026
item.description: “The excitement of a half-century year-old man with his new dehumidifier”, he definitely said sarcastically (side-eye monkey dot gif).

item.title: 11:24 am, March 21, 2026
item.description: Black-removal continues.

media:content.media:description: Sketchy blocking-in of leather jerkin, Obligatory Checkerboard & Triangles™️ on the pauldrons, and roughed-up bionic bits.

item.title: 9:18 am, March 21, 2026
item.description: Working out where I’ll want the most saturated reds to go.

media:content.media:description: Little tip-taps of light greys added to the metallic jaw, some bone colour to the teefs, and initial layers of dark desaturated red in the shadows of gun-hairdo and loincloth up to full Mephiston Red as the extreme highlight.

item.title: 6:38 am, March 21, 2026
item.description: Deep, seasonal sleep drifting between the jumbled wrecks of nightmares at the bottom.

item.title: 9:00 pm, March 20, 2026
item.description: Chasing ‘green’.

media:content.media:description: A much more ‘olive drab’ attempt at green via non-greens this time around, compared to the much more saturated look I tend to prefer. If I can get a vibrant enough red to contrast it maybe I’ll finally Blanchitsu something?

item.title: 1:00 pm, March 20, 2026
item.description:
Making a brief (?) step away from dwarf pal to give @Berit ‘s Zorn challenge a try. A greenskin with metal bits makes perfect sense for a palette without explicit green or metallics, right?

Am I broken?

media:content.media:description: Tool assembly: plastic putty, plastic cement, lil plastic guy. Also: paints 👉

item.title: 1:33 pm, March 18, 2026
item.description:
Just noticed that the knuckles on both of my hands are grazed and I’ve no memory of banging them against anything.

That’s totally normal, right?

item.title: 4:22 pm, March 15, 2026
item.description: Obligatory wig-mount shot.

media:content.media:description: One painting handle for the dwarf, one for the axe and top-knot, that’s always been my motto. They said I was _mad_, but who’s laughing now? The pile of background paints is accreting, fast becoming an entity with its opinions on the matter.

item.title: 1:58 pm, March 15, 2026
item.description: At some point I really need to work out what I’m doing for hands. Those in the set both have weapons, but I’d rather he was just clenching his fists while screaming into the unseen, like the rest of us. I’ll have to see what options I have that are 3D-printable.
